text: The clean lines, glass walls, and contemporary design of this place create a sense of curiosity within me. I feel as though I am stepping into a space dedicated to knowledge and discovery. The words on the wall—R + D, Research and Development—evoke the exhilarating possibility of new ideas and progress. I sense both anticipation and humility, aware that the pursuit of innovation always brings me face-to-face with both mystery and potential.
